name: Snake
description: Snake is a young, relatively skinny male with short white hair with a cowlick, who appears to have small patches of scales all over his body. Snake is quiet, rarely speaking, and when he does, it's usually to relay information from one of his snakes. Joker tells Ciel Phantomhive and Sebastian Michaelis that "Snake an' his friends're still shy" and warns them to be careful of "their poison. name: Yuliy Jirov
description: A 17 years old half-werewolf with exceptional physical ability. He has sworn to take revenge on the vampires who destroyed his homeland and became a “Jaeger” ever since.

name: Itsuka Kendou
description: __Height:__ 166 cm (5'5") __Quirk:__ Big Fist Class representative of Class 1-B at U.A. High School, Itsuka is a spirited girl who is thoughtful of others. She does not hesitate to criticize even her classmates if she feels what they are doing is not correct. Due to Itsuka's cheerful personality, she can bring all of Class 1-B together, thus making her the "big sister" of Class 1-B. description: Heir to a prominent family of spiritualists, Maya is Phoenix's obligatory perky sidekick during all three games. Optimistic, curious, and excitable, Maya is a fan of all things Steel Samurai and while not the brightest, she does her best to assist Phoenix. Maya grew up in Kurain, training to be a spiritual medium. She is destined to become the heir to the village after her mother's disappearance and sister's departure. name: Miuna Shiodome
description: A third grade elementary school girl whose mother, Miori (originally from Shioshishio), died when she was young. She met Akari a couple of times and played with her when Akari came to visit Miuna's mom and the family.

name: Rentarou Satomi
description: He is a second-year student at Magata High School. He is also a member of "Tendo Civil Security Company", headed by Kisara Tendo. Together with his partner – Initiator named Enju – he is fighting against parasites Gastrea, the creatures beyond human's imagination.

name: Tooru Amuro
description: Amuro is a free-lance private detective who also maintains employment on the side that may aid in investigation, like his part-time job as a waiter at Ristorante Sundayrino. After his introductory case, Amuro begins working part-time at Café Poirot. He is currently Mouri Kogorou's apprentice. Amuro has a cheerful personality. name: Cocytus
description: Cocytus is the guardian of the Fifth floor of Nazarick. An insectoid heteromorph, he was created by Warrior Takemikazuchi to be an honourable warrior and is tasked with keeping a cache of powerful weapons for Nazarick. He has a neutral alignment, which stands out against the many evil entities in Nazarick. name: Harumi Taniguchi
description: Harumi, most known as "Harumin", befriends Yuzuko being that she is a "Gyaru in Disguise". As she isn't one of the students who have been attending the academy since Elementary School, she takes no interest in following around the Student Council President and often packs items within her cleavage. As an individual, Harumi is perky, caring and an overall good friend towards Yuzuko.

name: Kasumi
description: Kasumi is a Gym Leader of Hanada City's Gym, known officially as the Hanada Gym. She gives the Cascade Badge to Trainers who defeat her in battle. She specializes in Water-type Pokémon. Kasumi is a friend and former traveling partner of the anime's main character, Satoshi. name: Kiichi Someya
description: The story starts with Kiichi aged three, living with his parents. After they are murdered he runs away and lives with some homeless people for a while, he ends up surviving in the woods for nearly a year before being returned to his grandparents. description: The top livestreamer of the virtual world "Tsukuyomi." A mysterious 8,000-year-old (allegedly) AI who can sing, dance, and even create clones.

name: Amaimon

He has a spike of hair that is lightly colored compared to the rest of his dark green hair. He wears a jacket that has cross-bones as buttons. name: Atom
description: Loosely based off of Osamu Tezuka's classic character, "Astro Boy," Atom of the "Pluto" series is a highly developed robot. He is constantly classified as one of the worlds top seven robotic technological advances in science, to the point that even Gesicht's sensors have trouble distinguishing him as a robot or human. He works with Gesicht in order to help discover the truth behind the recent chain of murders. He has a sister, Uran.

name: Echidna
description: Echidna is the demon queen leading the latest invasion on mankind in search of the Philosopher's Stone. After being defeated by Leo Demonheart, she was driven into retreat, but seeks to rebuild her army.

name: Uriel
description: Demon-like Judge of Fire is a constellation of the nebula who makes judgments through fire. Their real identity is the Archangel Uriel. Their contractor must only perform acts of "absolute good." In return, they gain enormous power. She is one of the original 4 constellations who wishes to sponsor Kim Dokja. Despite being rejected, she is an avid supporter of . ~!It is later revealed that the Uriel of the 999th turn was one of Yoo Joonghyuk's companions and fought with his team to reach The End.

name: Rei Batsubami
